rationale: Increasing the homestead exemption reduces taxable values statewide, altering parcel taxable values used in detachment calculations and potentially shifting which districts exceed the §48.257 local revenue level, requiring consequential adjustments to wealth-equalization mechanics.
quote: The commissioner shall detach from each school district covered by Subsection (a) one or more whole parcels or items of property in descending order of the taxable value of each parcel or item
_note: The proposed homestead exemption increase directly affects 'taxable value' inputs central to §49.305's detachment formula. No direct textual conflict, but consequential downstream effects on Chapter 49 wealth-equalization operations likely require legislative attention to thresholds and calculations.
